import sys, inspect
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import get_spherical_cameras
from tsr.utils import get_ray_directions, get_rays
for name, fn in [('get_spherical_cameras', get_spherical_cameras), ('get_ray_directions', get_ray_directions), ('get_rays', get_rays)]:
    print(name, inspect.signature(fn))
    src = inspect.getsource(fn).splitlines()
    print('n_lines', len(src))
    for i, l in enumerate(src, 1):
        if name == 'get_spherical_cameras' and 40 <= i <= 60:
            print(f'{i:03d}: {l}')
        elif name != 'get_spherical_cameras':
            print(f'{i:03d}: {l}')
    print('---')
